response.overview: When a group known as Revelation of the Mind find out they have been living in a computer simulation their whole lives they aggressively pursue the creators. Everyone in the group is scheduled for execution because of their actions. The two leaders of the small coalition Ezzra (Colin Foss) and Terry (Nico Santini) escape into the mysterious dystopian future. Meanwhile, everyone else in the simulation who tries to escape is redirected into a purgatory made of randomly generated spaces from reality… however they are never ending and there is no hope of escape. Will Ezzra and Terry be able to stop the creators and set everyone free? Should they have even messed with the framework of their reality in the first place?!
response.title: Isolation of the Mind
